claims.live_value: Migration 004 FAILED with a syntax error at/near COMMIT; transaction rolled back, no schema changes applied, 004 still pending.
Schema dump shows only the invoices pkey; explicit note '(no other indexes on public.invoices)' — idx_invoices_customer does not exist.
The rollback file exists but no test run record exists; the rollback was never exercised because the index was never created.

notes: The staging-applied premise is contradicted: 004 failed on a genuine SQL defect (CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY cannot run inside the BEGIN block; missing semicolon before COMMIT). Re-scoped task: fix 004_add_index.sql, re-apply and verify on staging, then exercise the rollback — before any production run is prepped.
